# Benchmark results

<!-- Generated by `bun run bench` вЂ” do not edit by hand. -->

Raw single-threaded Draco decode time: every Draco primitive of each file is decoded
sequentially, and the table reports the median of 10 such runs (after 3 warmup runs).
The corpus is the production bundle GLBs from `example/public/models` plus the sample models
shipped in [mrdoob/draco.js](https://github.com/mrdoob/draco.js) (`samples/`, used straight
from the installed dependency). The last two columns say how minidraco compares to each other
decoder: рџџў minidraco is faster, рџ”ґ minidraco is slower, вљЄ within 5% (run noise).

- Date: 2026-07-05
- Runtime: bun 1.3.14 (JavaScriptCore)
- CPU: Apple M3

| file                              | prims |   faces | minidraco |  draco.js | draco3d (wasm) | minidraco vs draco.js | minidraco vs wasm |
| --------------------------------- | ----: | ------: | --------: | --------: | -------------: | --------------------- | ----------------- |
| `canine-bundle.glb`               |     1 |     532 |   0.65 ms |   0.65 ms |        0.88 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.34x faster   |
| `player-bundle.glb`               |     7 |   2,544 |   2.13 ms |   2.42 ms |        1.39 ms | рџџў 1.13x faster       | рџ”ґ 1.53x slower   |
| `static-bundle.glb`               |   488 | 220,879 |  48.33 ms |  52.09 ms |       50.13 ms | рџџў 1.08x faster       | вљЄ even           |
| `IridescentDishWithOlives.glb`    |     4 |  24,448 |   3.89 ms |   3.94 ms |        4.43 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.14x faster   |
| `LittlestTokyo.glb`               |    71 | 141,802 |  71.04 ms |  74.18 ms |       75.96 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.07x faster   |
| `ShaderBall2.glb`                 |     3 |  13,388 |   4.37 ms |   4.44 ms |        5.08 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.16x faster   |
| `bath_day.glb`                    |    22 |  32,158 |   5.38 ms |   5.65 ms |        5.68 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.06x faster   |
| `duck.glb`                        |     1 |   4,212 |   0.78 ms |   0.86 ms |        1.09 ms | рџџў 1.10x faster       | рџџў 1.39x faster   |
| `ferrari.glb`                     |    51 | 358,788 |  62.22 ms |  63.38 ms |       76.43 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.23x faster   |
| `forest_house.glb`                |    12 |  10,956 |   2.58 ms |   2.53 ms |        2.91 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.13x faster   |
| `gears.glb`                       |     3 |  21,696 |   3.12 ms |   3.17 ms |        3.49 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.12x faster   |
| `kira.glb`                        |    43 |  51,601 |   9.71 ms |   9.40 ms |       11.21 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.15x faster   |
| `minimalistic_modern_bedroom.glb` |     4 |  10,457 |   2.63 ms |   2.62 ms |        3.01 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.15x faster   |
| `nemetona.glb`                    |     1 | 320,352 | 132.13 ms | 134.47 ms |      142.17 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.08x faster   |
| `pool.glb`                        |     2 |  22,280 |   5.27 ms |   5.03 ms |        4.18 ms | вљЄ even               | рџ”ґ 1.26x slower   |
| `rolex.glb`                       |    24 | 120,336 |  37.70 ms |  36.89 ms |       41.94 ms | вљЄ even               | рџџў 1.11x faster   |
| `venice_mask.glb`                 |     5 | 295,600 |  76.91 ms |  77.71 ms |       80.17 ms | вљЄ even               | вљЄ even           |
| `bunny.drc`                       |     1 |  69,451 |   7.90 ms |   8.53 ms |        4.25 ms | рџџў 1.08x faster       | рџ”ґ 1.86x slower   |
| `car.drc`                         |     1 |   1,744 |   0.10 ms |   3.12 ms |        0.14 ms | рџџў 30.44x faster      | рџџў 1.32x faster   |
| `duck.drc`                        |     1 |   4,212 |   1.07 ms |   1.08 ms |        1.08 ms | вљЄ even               | вљЄ even           |

Medians of independent runs still carry roughly В±10% JIT/thermal noise вЂ” treat this as the
cross-decoder picture, not a micro-optimization ranking. V8 (browsers) ranks the decoders
differently than JSC; see the in-browser benchmark at `/bench` in the example app.
